================================================================================
RINGKASAN PROYEK
================================================================================

Style: Clay Art / Plasticine Diorama

Platform: TikTok / Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts
Tone: Edukatif

================================================================================
Narrative: STOP! Ribet bikin konten?

handmade plasticine background

smooth matte clay surface
Malam

8k resolution, sharp focus
soft bokeh clay background

================================================================================
1. Generate images using clay prompts (NVIDIA/Gemini)
2. Create video with FFmpeg or AI tools

4. Link: https://lynk.id/jendralbot/xlymwzj2jylv
5. Hashtags: #AIcontent #clayart #starter #AIindonesia
